title: Topsky Glass Soap Dispenser with Black Plastic Pump, 400ml Liquid Hand Soap Dispenser, Rustproof Pump for Kitchen & Bathroom, Great for Lotions, Essential Oil, Liquid Soaps (Amber)
features: Modern Design: The bottle body is made of lead-free glass with stylish vertical stripes on the surface, making the bottle more textured and non-slip effect
Pump Head: The black plastic pump head prevents the emulsion from rusting due to the alkalinity of the emulsion, thus extending the life of the pump head
Style: Elegant amber, very suitable for your bathroom and kitchen, is a classic furniture colour style
Use: Suitable for hand soap, shampoo, shower gel, lotion. Refillable soap dispenser for storing daily liquids
Applications: The soap dispenser can be placed on the bathroom countertop, kitchen sink, laundry room, farmhouse or beach and more
